motion: PR #105 (T5 — Agent character scene) is correct and ready to merge into feature/86-feature-phase-1-skeleton-tower

fixes.description: Clamp STATE_TINTS values to <=1.0 — WORKING and REPORTING have R/G components of 1.2 which are silently clamped on non-HDR viewports, wasting the brightening intent. Replace with values <=1.0 that achieve visible hue/saturation differentiation instead.

Guard exit animation against concurrent _rebuild_interior calls. _rebuild_interior calls queue_free() on all children unconditionally at floor_scene.gd:136-137, which cuts any mid-fade AgentCharacter node. Fix: in play_exit_animation(), reparent the fading node out of _agent_slots_node (e.g. to the floor root) before starting the tween, so _rebuild_interior never touches it. Remove it from _agent_slots_node in the tween_callback instead.

pr_amendments: Note that STATE_TINTS values >1.0 were corrected to work on non-HDR viewports.
Note that exit animation is now guarded against concurrent edge rebuilds.
